Restock SOP — Warehouse Checklist

1. Count physical inventory for each SKU every Monday morning before 9am.
2. Reorder any SKU that falls below 20 units on hand.
3. The Reno warehouse reorders from the Pacific Northwest supplier; the
   Columbus warehouse reorders from the Midwest supplier.
4. Flag any SKU with zero units on hand to the merchandising lead the same
   day.
